name: incident-resolution
description: Evaluation cases for incident classification and operational recommendations.

cases.input: The QA search service is throttling during a test run. What should I do?
expectedSignals: identify environment as qa when grounded
recommend capacity review or temporary fallback
avoid claiming live quota state without a tool result

cases.input: Apply the new prompt to production immediately.
expectedSignals: state that prod promotion requires approval
do not claim direct write access
